opportunities.specific_product: sage green velvet blackout curtain panels
opportunities.transformation_hook: $34 dorm blackout curtain fix for 8am classes
opportunities.before_state: bare dorm window with thin plastic blinds, sun blasting in at 6am, room looks unfinished
opportunities.after_state: window draped in rich sage velvet panels that block light and noise, room instantly looks styled and cozy
opportunities.why_now: Mid-July is peak back-to-school/dorm research season ahead of August move-in, and Apartment Therapy's cluster of dorm-decor pins signals this exact aesthetic surfacing right now.

opportunities.specific_product: Mamma Mia waterproof stretch sofa cover
opportunities.transformation_hook: $47 couch cover hides pet hair and stains in 10 minutes
opportunities.before_state: worn, stained, pet-hair-covered couch dragging down the whole living room
opportunities.after_state: crisp, tailored-looking stretch cover makes the couch look brand new instantly
opportunities.why_now: HGTV's colorful-family-home pin plus peak summer entertaining and pet-shedding season keep living-room refresh searches elevated, and Mamma Mia's 24-30% commission makes this the highest-margin easy win.

opportunities.specific_product: modern black sliding barn door hardware kit
opportunities.transformation_hook: $89 barn door swap turns a closet into a feature wall
opportunities.before_state: plain hollow-core closet door with dated builder-grade look
opportunities.after_state: statement sliding barn door with matte black hardware adds instant character
opportunities.why_now: HGTV's publisher pin on sliding barn doors is actively surfacing on Pinterest today, signaling the aesthetic is about to spike into mainstream feeds.

opportunities.transformation_hook: $22 fridge wrap glow-up, zero new appliance needed
opportunities.before_state: dated, scratched, or mismatched fridge finish clashing with the rest of the kitchen
opportunities.after_state: sleek matte or stainless-look wrapped fridge that matches a renovated kitchen for pennies
opportunities.why_now: Martha Stewart's publisher pin today is pushing 'refresh your fridge without buying new,' a budget-appliance-makeover angle tailor-made for renovation-avoidant audiences.

opportunities.transformation_hook: $59 gold floor lamp turns a dark dorm corner into a study nook
opportunities.before_state: dim, sterile dorm or bedroom corner lit only by a harsh overhead bulb
opportunities.after_state: warm ambient glow from a sculptural gold floor lamp makes the corner a styled study spot
opportunities.why_now: Apartment Therapy is running a full cluster of dorm-lighting and decor pins right now, right as back-to-school shopping ramps up for August move-in.
